title: Citrusy Ham and Jelly Tagine
description: A flavorful and sweet tagine made with ham, jelly, and citrusy notes, inspired by Peruvian cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large tagine over medium heat.
Add diced ham and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced serrano peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in aji amarillo paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add jelly, orange juice, and chopped rosemary. Stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with additional rosemary if desired.
